verses.text: Mite lakah kamsang manlo a omngei mah bangin note lakah sia manlo hong om ding hi. Siatna a piangsak thei thuhilhna a manlo hong lutpih simin, amaute mahmah a tankhia Topa nangawn nial ding uh hi. Tua ahih manin thakhat thu-in siatna thuaklawh ding uh hi
Tua bang hinapi-in mi tampi tak in amau' gamtat hoihlohna zui ding uh a, tua bangin amau gamtatna hangin mite in thuman lampi gensia ding uh hi

Hih sia manlote in a huaiham manun note kiang panin sum a ngahtheihna dingun phuahtawm thu hong gen ding uh hi. Ahi zongin sawtpeka kipanin amaute' thu a Khen dingpa a kigingsa-in om niloh a, amaute a Susia dingpa in en gige hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh vantung mite nangawn in khialhna a neih ciangin Pasian in khahkhong loin hell khuk sungah khia a, Thukhen Ni hun dong ngakin khuamial sungah kol bulhsa-in a omsak hi
Pasian in tanglai mite khahkhong loin amah a umlo mite, tuiciin tumsak a, thuman thutak a hilh Noah leh adang mi sagih bek suaktasak hi
Pasian in Sodom leh Gomorrah khuapite tungah thu khenin mei tawh haltum a, Pasian a umlo mite' thuakna ding limin a bawl hi
Ngeina bangin a gamtalo mite in Lot a lungkhamsakna panun Pasian in mihoih Lot a honkhia hi
Tua mihoihpa, amaute lakah teng a, nisimin amaute' gamtat hoihlohnate za-in mu tawntung ahih manin lunggim mahmah hi
Tua ahih manin Topa in tua bang mihoihte a gimna uh panin suakta sakin, tua bang migilote Thukhen Ni hun dongin gimna pia-in a koihcip theihna ding siamna a nei hi
Pasian' thu nialin amau pumpi deihna zui-in a gamta mite gim pia phadiak hi. Hih sia manlote kiphasakin hangsan mahmah uh a, minthan'na a nei vantunga omte zahtak hetloin gensia ngam uh hi
Hih sia manlote sangin hatzaw-in a vanglianzaw vantung mite nangawn in Topa' mai-ah minthan'na a nei vantung mite gensia ngamlo, mawhsak ngamlo uh hi
Ahi zongin matding leh thahdingin a piang gamlak ganhing gilote bangin a pian'pih lungsim uh zui-in gamta uh a, a theihloh uh thute a gensia uh hi. Tua ganhingte mah bangin amaute kisusia ding a

mite a gimsak mah bangun amaute tungah gimna kipia ding hi. A ut bangbangun suntangpi-in gamtat ding nuam a sa uh hi. Tua bang mite in note tawh ankuang hong umkhawmin, a zuau gamtatnate uhah nuamsa-in a om uh pen amaute-a' dingin a zumhuai mahmah ahi hi
Numei bekbek etnopin nei uh a, a mawhnopna lungsim uh kam theilo hi. Upna cingtaaklo mite zol belin nei uh a, huaihamna lungsim bekbek a nei uh hi. Tua bang mite, Pasian' samsiat mite ahi uh hi
Thuman lampi nusia-in gammang uh a, a manloin gamtatna tawh sum a ngahnuam Beor' tapa Balaam' gamtat bangin gamta uh hi
Balaam in ama mawhna hangin taiina a thuak hi. A pau theilo la, mihing bangin hong pau a, kamsang Balaam' haitatna a khawlsak hi
Hihbang mite pen a kangcip khinsa ciktui, huih in a mutkhiat meiipi tawh kibang uh a, Pasian in amaute' omna dingin khuamial sahpi omna mun a koih kholhsak hi
Amaute kiphasakin haipau uh a, a khial gamtat mite sung panin a suakta khin liailiai zo mite, leitung pumpi deih bangin a gamtatna dingun a zol uh hi
Amaute pen siatna a piangsak thei zongsatna lelin sila hinapi-un mite tungah suahtakna ding thu a gen uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite pen, a hong zo peuhpeuhte' sila ihi hi
I Topa leh Honpa Jesuh Khrih theihna hangin leitung siatna sung panin suakta khin napi-un, leitung siatna-ah awk kikin a lelte pen, a masa a pianzia uh sangin a nunung a pianzia uh siahuaizaw hi
Tua bang mite in amaute tungah a kipia thu siangthote thei-in a nusiat kik sangun thuman lampi a thei ngei hetlo uh hi leh amau-a' dingin hoihzaw thampek ding hi
Paunak-ah, “Ui in a luak nekik hi,” a cihna leh, “Vok a kisilsiang khit ciangin buannawng lak mahah bualkik veve hi,” a kicihna thu, amaute tungah a piang ahi hi.
